title: selaginella prolifera
intro: Selaginella prolifera, also known as creeping spikemoss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is native to tropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella prolifera include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
